name: io.github.teamsincetoday/recipe-commerce-mcp
description: Extract shoppable ingredients from recipe content with affiliate signals.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o-mini product extraction (required)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_KEYS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paid API keys for unlimited calls (optional — omit for free tier: 200 calls/day)
